title: Synthetic tool-use trace with dependency memory
goal: Book a meeting room and notify the team without sending the message before the room is confirmed.
interruption_point: The run stopped after one invalid action ordering and one dependency correction.

events.text: Goal: Book a meeting room and notify the team without sending the message before the room is confirmed.
Plan: Check room availability, reserve a room, draft the message with the room details, then send the notification.
Constraint: The team message must not be sent before the room reservation succeeds.
Source: calendar.rooms.search returned three available rooms for Friday at 2 PM.
Attempt: Drafted and queued the team message before reserving the room. The step order was wrong.
Outcome: The message could not be finalized because no room id existed yet.
Lesson: The room reservation id is a dependency for the final message.
Decision: Reserve the room first and only then compose the final team notification.
Next step: Reserve the selected room and pass the reservation id into the notification draft.
Assumption: The selected room will remain available for the next tool call.

expected_items.name: protect_ordering_constraint
keywords: must not be sent before the room reservation succeeds
